mapper.insert: insert into work_order_merge(master_order_no, merged_order_no, merge_reason, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at) values (#{masterOrderNo}, #{mergedOrderNo}, #{mergeReason}, #{operatorUsername}, #{operatorDisplayName}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select id, master_order_no, merged_order_no, merge_reason, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at from work_order_merge where id = #{id}
select id, master_order_no, merged_order_no, merge_reason, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at from work_order_merge where merged_order_no = #{mergedOrderNo}
select id, master_order_no, merged_order_no, merge_reason, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at from work_order_merge where master_order_no = #{masterOrderNo} order by created_at desc
select count(1) from work_order_merge where master_order_no = #{masterOrderNo}
